title: One task in more boards
excerpt:
Is there any chance to have one task in more boards, no with connections boards or mirroring. 
My problem is that I need to have one task in more boards with updates and everything.

posts.author: MarieBartosova (Marie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there any chance to have one task in more boards, no with connections boards or mirroring.
My problem is that I need to have one task in more boards with updates and everything.
